80a92941 HEAD@{14}: commit: jjb:1011-56346600::i: OFFICIUM 260426-1008
56346600 HEAD@{15}: commit: jjb:1011-430eefca:₢A_AAU:W: Threaded RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_* across the Director→Cloud Build boundary so renaming a basename Director-side stops silently desyncing producer/consumer. Three Director jq blocks (rbfd conjure stitcher; rbfv graft combined about+vouch; rbfv multi-mode vouch) gained --arg/substitution pairs for the basenames each consumer group needs (_RBGY_*: image+attest+diags; _RBGA_*: image+about+diags; _RBGV_*: image+vouch+attest). Nine consumer scripts (7 bash, 2 python) replaced bare 'image'/'vouch'/'about'/'attest'/'diags' literals with ${_RBG?_ARK_BASENAME_*} reads, each gating on the new env var at its required-inputs check. Pouch unchanged — it's GCB input, never a producer write. Verification surfaced four side-effect notches: kludged sentry + bottle for tadmor (depot's k260416190047-... was missing from local AND from GAR), spook-fixed rbob_charged_predicate which had been left behind in the ₢A_AAA-AAC RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX rollout (compose -p was using bare ${RBRN_MONIKER}), and extracted ZRBOB_PROJECT constant to eliminate the bug class (six hand-rolled ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER} sites collapsed to one). Fast suite 97/97 green; tadmor crucible fixture 54/54 green; srjcl/pluml fixtures need their own kludge bootstrap (same depot-state pattern) — deferred. Cloud Build burn-in (the actual end-to-end signal for this work) deferred to AAP per docket. Spawned ₢BAAAH kludge-aware-charge-prereq on ₣BA to address the diagnostic gap that made the sentry-kludge dance discoverable only by hand: the existing missing-vouch warning suggests summon for k-prefixed hallmarks which is guaranteed to fail because they never go to GAR. That pace will mint the RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_{KLUDGE,CONJURE,BIND,GRAFT} family (currently four bare literals at rbfd:1137,1293,1391,1648) and discriminate at the charge-time prerequisite check.
430eefca HEAD@{16}: commit: jjb:1011-f7146d1d:₣BA:S: kludge-aware-charge-prereq
f7146d1d HEAD@{17}: commit: jjb:1011-a8eb7311:₢A_AAU:n: Extract ZRBOB_PROJECT constant for the runtime-prefixed compose project name (was ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER} hand-rolled at six sites). Eliminates the bug class that produced the prior spook — a future site author cannot now forget to thread the prefix because the concept has a name. Sites collapsed: ZRBOB_SENTRY/PENTACLE/BOTTLE container names, ZRBOB_NETWORK enclave name, zrbob_compose -p arg, rbob_charged_predicate -p arg. Constant placed at the top of the existing kindle block with a docstring naming it as the authoritative project identity from which container/network names derive. Verified with a charge → rbw-cic probe (exit=0) → quench cycle on tadmor: containers labeled rbxr-tadmor-{sentry,pentacle,bottle}, networks rbxr-tadmor_{enclave,default}, probe matches — all consistent with the new single source of truth.
a8eb7311 HEAD@{18}: commit: jjb:1011-0b045b57:₢A_AAU:n: Spook fix surfaced during AAU crucible verification: rbob_charged_predicate at rbob_bottle.sh:345 missed the RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX rollout from the AAA-AAC prefix-introduction work. The probe queried 'compose -p ${RBRN_MONIKER}' (e.g. 'tadmor') while every other compose invocation — including the actual charge at line 202 — uses 'compose -p ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}' (e.g. 'rbxr-tadmor'). Verified: rbw-cic.CrucibleIsCharged.sh tadmor now exits 0 against the live charged crucible (was exit 1 despite three healthy containers). Single-line addition; no other use of bare ${RBRN_MONIKER} as a compose project name in the file.
0b045b57 HEAD@{19}: commit: jjb:1011-4dcb0aa2:₢A_AAU:n: Bottle kludge for tadmor: drive RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK=k260426091932-4dcb0aa2 (rbev-bottle-ifrit-tether). Pairs with the prior sentry kludge to give tadmor a fully-local crucible state for AAU verification.

Yoked 10 conjure vessels via rbw-dY; manually re-pointed rbev-bottle-plantuml (mode=bind) and rbev-graft-demo (mode=graft) — yoke refuses non-conjure vessels but rbfd_mirror line 1384 and rbfd_graft's about/vouch step images both consume the reliquary, so the 'no reliquary needed' policy is itself the defect (already flagged in ₢A_AAS commit b602b7c5 as follow-up; not yet captured as a formal itch — capture pending end-of-pace). Verification re-run held until user signal.

56346600 HEAD@{15}: commit: jjb:1011-430eefca:₢A_AAU:W: Threaded RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_* across the Director→Cloud Build boundary so renaming a basename Director-side stops silently desyncing producer/consumer. Three Director jq blocks (rbfd conjure stitcher; rbfv graft combined about+vouch; rbfv multi-mode vouch) gained --arg/substitution pairs for the basenames each consumer group needs (_RBGY_*: image+attest+diags; _RBGA_*: image+about+diags; _RBGV_*: image+vouch+attest). Nine consumer scripts (7 bash, 2 python) replaced bare 'image'/'vouch'/'about'/'attest'/'diags' literals with ${_RBG?_ARK_BASENAME_*} reads, each gating on the new env var at its required-inputs check. Pouch unchanged — it's GCB input, never a producer write. Verification surfaced four side-effect notches: kludged sentry + bottle for tadmor (depot's k260416190047-... was missing from local AND from GAR), spook-fixed rbob_charged_predicate which had been left behind in the ₢A_AAA-AAC RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX rollout (compose -p was using bare ${RBRN_MONIKER}), and extracted ZRBOB_PROJECT constant to eliminate the bug class (six hand-rolled ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER} sites collapsed to one). Fast suite 97/97 green; tadmor crucible fixture 54/54 green; srjcl/pluml fixtures need their own kludge bootstrap (same depot-state pattern) — deferred. Cloud Build burn-in (the actual end-to-end signal for this work) deferred to AAP per docket. Spawned ₢BAAAH kludge-aware-charge-prereq on ₣BA to address the diagnostic gap that made the sentry-kludge dance discoverable only by hand: the existing missing-vouch warning suggests summon for k-prefixed hallmarks which is guaranteed to fail because they never go to GAR. That pace will mint the RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_{KLUDGE,CONJURE,BIND,GRAFT} family (currently four bare literals at rbfd:1137,1293,1391,1648) and discriminate at the charge-time prerequisite check.

Eliminates the bug class that produced the prior spook — a future site author cannot now forget to thread the prefix because the concept has a name. Sites collapsed: ZRBOB_SENTRY/PENTACLE/BOTTLE container names, ZRBOB_NETWORK enclave name, zrbob_compose -p arg, rbob_charged_predicate -p arg. Constant placed at the top of the existing kindle block with a docstring naming it as the authoritative project identity from which container/network names derive. Verified with a charge → rbw-cic probe (exit=0) → quench cycle on tadmor: containers labeled rbxr-tadmor-{sentry,pentacle,bottle}, networks rbxr-tadmor_{enclave,default}, probe matches — all consistent with the new single source of truth.

**Real divergence picture (after fetch):**

```
Common ancestor: 02114b57 (my reliquary refresh — already on origin)

Local (13 ahead, branched from 02114b57):
  271b0135 (my bind jq fix) ← created by this session
  2be0812a (OFFICIUM 260426-1009) ← NOT my officium (mine is 1008)
  35c04cb4..e6956bec (₣BB heat creation + 7 phase commits) ← unknown origin

Origin (2 ahead, branched from 02114b57):
  ffdd7348 ₣BA: moved BAAAF to last
  9f909781 jjx_redocket
```

**Two things to flag before we touch anything:**

1. **A different officium (260426-1009) made commits in this very workspace's reflog.** The 11 ₣BB commits flow through my HEAD — meaning *some* claude session in this checkout created an entire new heat (`rbk-mvp-3-release-qualification`) with phases 0-6 and runbook docs. Per multi-officium discipline I shouldn't assume those are mine. Before doing anything reconciliation-related, can you confirm: did you (or another Claude session) intentionally create heat ₣BB in this directory? If yes, we just need to merge. If no, this needs a closer look first.

2. **Origin has 2 ₣BA-side commits** (jjx_redocket + reorder) that look like Job Jockey state changes from somewhere else. Likely small text edits to `.claude/jjm/` files; unlikely to conflict with our code work.

content.text:
**Update — file footprint shows the conflict surface is small and specific:**

- **Origin's 2 commits touch only**: `.claude/jjm/jjg_gallops.json` (1 file)
- **Local's 13 commits touch**: `.claude/jjm/jjg_gallops.json`, `.claude/jjm/jjp_uBuB.md` (new ₣BB paddock), `Tools/rbk/rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild.sh` (my bind jq fix)

So the **only collision is `jjg_gallops.json`** — the JJ heat-state ledger. That's a JJ-maintained file; hand-resolving its conflicts is fragile. If JJ has a tool for this, that's the right path.

I am explicitly **not** taking any reconciliation action without your call. Three things to confirm/decide:

1. **₣BB heat ownership**: Did you (or another Claude session you started) intentionally create the `rbk-mvp-3-release-qualification` heat with phases 0-6? The reflog shows officium `260426-1009` made those commits in this workspace. Need to know whether to keep them or investigate.

2. **Reconciliation strategy**:
   - **Rebase local onto origin** (`git rebase origin/main`) — linear history; will likely conflict on `jjg_gallops.json` mid-rebase.
   - **Merge origin into local** (`git merge origin/main`) — single merge commit; same conflict but only one resolution moment.
   - **JJ-aware merge** — if there's a JJ tool that knows how to merge gallops state, that's safest. (I don't recall one offhand; want me to check?)

3. **Pull plan**: Do you want me to investigate option 3 first, or do you already know how you want to handle the gallops merge?

I'll wait on your answer before doing anything. No automatic destructive ops here.

content.subject: T1: Service suite
content.description: Run tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.service.sh — 80 cases. 78/80 passed; 2 failures in four-mode (conjure, bind).

content.subject: Re-run four-mode fixture
content.description: Re-run results: 3 passed (conjure, graft, kludge), 1 failed (bind). Conjure now PASSED — reliquary refresh + AAU fix worked. Bind FAILED at discover-platforms with '_RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE missing' — AAU's mirror jq block was missing the basename substitutions; conjure block at L724-726 has them. Fix applied: added 3 --arg + 3 substitutions to zrbfd_mirror_submit jq block at L1516.

content.subject: T1: Crucible suite
content.description: Crucible suite triaged. Tadmor security 54/54 GREEN — kludged hallmarks from AAU work intact, attack-containment surface verified end-to-end. srjcl/pluml charges blocked: their nameplates reference pre-AAK hallmarks (c260331... / b260331...) whose GAR artifacts are at the old layout shape. Summon would fail against the new-grammar paths. Pure depot-state issue. Classified AAE-scope (cleared by depot regen). Documented; moved on per docket triage rule.

content.subject: T2: Producer paths
content.description: Inscribe reliquary, conjure busybox, enshrine if applicable, graft. Confirm artifact layout via rbw-irh.

content.subject: T3: Consumer paths
content.description: Tally, plumb compact+full, summon, charge tadmor, quench tadmor.

content.subject: T4: Abjure cycles
content.description: Abjure freshly-conjured hallmark; abjure pre-AAK hallmark if any. Confirm enumerate-then-delete works.

content.subject: Yoke 13 vessels to r260426100632
content.description: 10 conjure vessels yoked to r260426100632. 2 refused by yoke policy: rbev-graft-demo (mode=graft) and rbev-bottle-plantuml (mode=bind). Both still have stale RBRV_RELIQUARY=r260425082412 in rbrv.env.

content.subject: Verify bind fix
content.description: rbtdrc_fourmode_bind_lifecycle PASSED with the AAU jq fix. All four modes now green: conjure, bind, graft, kludge.

Tadmor security 54/54 GREEN — kludged hallmarks from AAU work intact, attack-containment surface verified end-to-end. srjcl/pluml charges blocked: their nameplates reference pre-AAK hallmarks (c260331... / b260331...) whose GAR artifacts are at the old layout shape. Summon would fail against the new-grammar paths. Pure depot-state issue. Classified AAE-scope (cleared by depot regen). Documented; moved on per docket triage rule.

content.subject: T2: Producer paths
content.description: Inscribe reliquary, conjure busybox, enshrine if applicable, graft. Confirm artifact layout via rbw-irh.

content.subject: T3: Consumer paths
content.description: Tally, plumb compact+full, summon, charge tadmor, quench tadmor.

content.subject: T4: Abjure cycles
content.description: Abjure freshly-conjured hallmark; abjure pre-AAK hallmark if any. Confirm enumerate-then-delete works.

content.subject: Yoke 13 vessels to r260426100632
content.description: 10 conjure vessels yoked to r260426100632. 2 refused by yoke policy: rbev-graft-demo (mode=graft) and rbev-bottle-plantuml (mode=bind). Both still have stale RBRV_RELIQUARY=r260425082412 in rbrv.env.

content.subject: Verify bind fix
content.description: rbtdrc_fourmode_bind_lifecycle PASSED with the AAU jq fix. All four modes now green: conjure, bind, graft, kludge.
